method: Weighted Boxes Fusion ensemble of banana_real_v5.pt (YOLOv8m) + banana_real_v7.pt (YOLO11m)
eval_method: held-out test (50 images, 1166 plants), imgsz 1024, conf 0.20, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
note: Best detection result of the v2..v7 line. Fusing two architectures combines YOLOv8m precision with YOLO11m recall (both high: P 0.905, R 0.878). Cost: runs both models (~2x inference). Single farm/region; recalibrate per farm for deployment.
